/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('articles/2026/03/09/articles.jsonl')
queries={
'ipl_rcb':['royal challengers','bengaluru','ipl','opening match','season opener','chennai super kings','mumbai indians'],
'psg_chelsea':['paris st germain','psg','chelsea','substitute','two goals','gonc','ramos','barcola'],
'real_city':['real madrid','manchester city','hat-trick','hat trick','bellingham','rodrygo','mbappe','haaland'],
'cyber_med':['medical-device','medical device','cyberattack','hack','predatory sparrow','anonymous','retaliatory'],
'beirut_org':['central beirut','raouche','apartment','qods force','quds force','irgc','hezbollah'],
'synagogue':['synagogue','detroit','michigan','active shooter','assailant'],
'virginia':['virginia','university','shooting','terror'],
}
for name,terms in queries.items():
    print('###',name)
    shown=0
    for i,line in enumerate(p.open(),1):
        art=json.loads(line)
        text=((art.get('title') or '')+' '+(art.get('content') or '')).replace('\\n',' ')
        low=text.lower()
